mission.title: consul: Vendor directory causes type mismatch
mission.description: Vendor directory causes type mismatch. Requested by 11+ users.

steps.title: Check current consul deployment
steps.description:
Verify your consul version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n consul -l app.kubernetes.io/name=consul
helm list -n consul 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working consul installation.

steps.title: Review consul configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant consul configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n consul -l app.kubernetes.io/name=consul
kubectl get configmap -n consul -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=consul
```
The recent commit of the vendor directoy causes a type mismatch in our use of the consul api.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Vendor directory causes type mismatch
steps.description:
Fixed #5937
```yaml
go-micro/registry/consul/watcher.go:48:33: cannot use cr.Client (type *"github.com/hashicorp/consul/api".Client) as type *"github.com/hashicorp/consul/vendor/github.com/hashicorp/consul/api".Client in argument to wp.RunWithClientAndLogger
go-micro/registry/consul/watcher.go:213:37: cannot use cw.r.Client (type *"github.com/hashicorp/consul/api".Client) as type *"github.com/hashicorp/consul/vendor/github.com/hashicorp/consul/api".Client in argument to wp.RunWithClientAndLogger
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n consul -l app.kubernetes.io/name=consul
kubectl get events -n consul --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Vendor directory causes type mismatch" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/hashicorp/consul/pull/5943
codeSnippets:
go-micro/registry/consul/watcher.go:48:33: cannot use cr.Client (type *"github.com/hashicorp/consul/api".Client) as type *"github.com/hashicorp/consul/vendor/github.com/hashicorp/consul/api".Client in argument to wp.RunWithClientAndLogger
go-micro/registry/consul/watcher.go:213:37: cannot use cw.r.Client (type *"github.com/hashicorp/consul/api".Client) as type *"github.com/hashicorp/consul/vendor/github.com/hashicorp/consul/api".Client in argument to wp.RunWithClientAndLogger

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with consul installed or the issue environment reproducible.
